name: Kmd Brands Limited
analysis: KMD's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 78% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.0660, stop A$0.0574, target A$0.0760 (1.17:1) — then trail it.
